summary: App shell exposes the route container and the storage adapter to the Stats Pipeline and Dashboard.

route_registration.name: registerRoute
route_registration.shape: (routeId: string, mountFn: (container: HTMLElement) => void, unmountFn?: () => void) => void
route_registration.purpose: Stats Dashboard registers itself under routeId='stats'.

storage_adapter.name: storage
storage_adapter.shape: { get(key: string): any|null, set(key: string, value: any): void, clear(prefix?: string): void }
storage_adapter.namespace_rule: Stats persists totals under prefix 'gto-trainer/v1/stats/' with a schema_version field inside the payload to enable forward migration.
storage_adapter.purpose: Stats writes running totals via storage.set; reads on dashboard mount via storage.get.

data_passed_not_logic: Shell passes container, storage adapter, navigation callback. Shell does not compute any stat; section-6 does not implement storage backends.

section-6_owns: all stats computation, persistence under its prefix, dashboard rendering

test_seam: Mount stats dashboard into a stub container with a stubbed storage adapter; assert dashboard reads default zero values when storage is empty and reads prior totals when storage is pre-populated.
